name: Acumatica Cloud ERP API
what_it_does: Acumatica REST and OData API for cloud ERP platform. Enables AI agents to manage financial data including GL, AP, AR, purchasing, inventory, and project accounting; retrieve business data across modules; trigger workflows; and integrate Acumatica into business intelligence and automation workflows. Acumatica supports distribution, manufacturing, and service industries.
use_cases: Retrieving financial reports and transaction data from finance analytics agents
Managing AP invoices and vendor payments from accounts payable agents
Accessing inventory and purchase order data from supply chain agents
Integrating Acumatica ERP data into CRM and business intelligence workflow agents
not_for: Small business without multi-module ERP needs
best_when: A mid-market company using Acumatica for ERP wants AI agents to automate financial operations, retrieve business data, and integrate ERP data into analytics and automation workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP data manipulation can cause accounting errors. Test in Acumatica sandbox before production. Acumatica uses both REST and OData endpoints — verify which for each use case.

auth.notes: Acumatica supports multiple auth methods: username/password cookie-based sessions, OAuth 2.0, and API access keys. OAuth recommended for third-party integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Mid-market ERP pricing per user; consumption-based licensing available
pricing.notes: Unique consumption-based licensing (no per-user cost). Mid-market focus. Deployed on cloud or on-premise.

performance.rate_limits: API throttling per deployment; can be configured by system administrator

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial data manipulation requires careful testing in sandbox
No public MCP server — REST/OData API integration required
Acumatica has both REST Contract API and Screen-Based API — prefer Contract API for integrations
OData endpoint available for querying but has different URL patterns than REST
No webhooks — must poll for data changes or use push notifications configured in Acumatica
Multi-currency and multi-company support adds complexity to financial data handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Full ERP financial access. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 recommended. Multi-region data residency. Sandbox environment available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Full ERP financial access. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency.
